name: Old Wooden Doll
descs:
[Effects apply only to #1, #2 Deployed Identities]

On Crit, inflict 1 [DefenseDown] next turn. (3 times per turn per Identity)
[Cannot Stack] When Red Sheet Don Quixote's E.G.O Passive activates, this effect does not activate.

[Effects apply only to #1, #2, and <style="upgradeHighlight">#3</style> Deployed Identities]

On Crit, inflict 1 [DefenseDown] next turn. (<style="upgradeHighlight">4</style> times per turn per Identity)
[Cannot Stack] When Red Sheet Don Quixote's E.G.O Passive activates, this effect does not activate.

[Effects apply only to #1, #2, and #3 Deployed Identities]

On Crit, inflict 1 [DefenseDown] next turn. (<style="upgradeHighlight">6</style> times per turn per Identity)
[Cannot Stack] When Red Sheet Don Quixote's E.G.O Passive activates, this effect does not activate.
